## Checklist

- [ ] SEP document drafted and placed in `docs/standard/sep/`
- [ ] Document follows the [SEP Template](https://github.com/alibaba/open-agent-auth/blob/main/docs/standard/index.md#sep-document-template)
- [ ] VitePress navigation entry added
- [ ] Community review period initiated
- [ ] Maintainer decision: Accept / Request Changes / Reject
